calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto
Appearances:
John W. Beebe, Esq. for Plaintiff Gurpal Singh, also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Steve Saman and Jesus Gaytan.
Damages of $100,716.00
Costs of $294.50
Interest of $10,071.60 For the total of $111,082.10.

Judgment signed in open court.
